10659573.title: Nidaa
10659573.description: The host invites individuals seeking to reconnect with their family members after years of estrangement in order to make sure that they are well.

10660283.title: Men Ajl Ebni
10660283.description: Poyraz,is an infamous former policeman enjoying his retirement. He is pulled out of retirement and goes undercover to infiltrate the biggest mafia in Istanbul to save his son. During his operation he meets Aysegul and falls in love with her.

10660431.title: Alwaad
10660431.description: Rano, Piya and Bani live with their widowed father. They move to Mumbai to live with their father's wealthy friend to fulfil his wish. In Mumbai they encounter situations that test their sisterhood.

10661357.title: On N'Est Pas Oblige D'Etre D'Accord
10661357.description: As a means to spread awareness and prove that adopting dissimilar outlooks is totally fine, the presenter converses with various youngsters about a multitude of topics that are open to dispute.

10662338.title: Al Hossein w Al Safia
10662338.description: Hossein and his wife try their best to overcome the challenges and start their own business.

10663318.title: Maa Al Nas
10663318.description: The host invites expert guests and analysts to discuss different social taboos and issues. The experts dig deep into how these taboos came about and how they affect society day to day.

10664280.title: Al Toyoor Al Majroohah
10664280.description: Two orphan siblings head to Istanbul for a new beginning away from the person who ruined their lives. However, things take a turn when the unexpected happens.
